name: End scrolls the Markdown preview to the bottom
comment: Regression for the 2.6.x preview keyboard-scroll bug: navigation keys did nothing in the WKWebView preview because it never took first responder and content JS was disabled. Opens a long Markdown file, shows the preview, focuses it, presses End, and captures before/after screenshots. NOTE(harden): element-scoped screenshots of the WKWebView come back blank unless medit is frontmost during capture (a WebKit/ScreenCaptureKit limitation) — so the captured PNGs are not yet reliable evidence here; the preview-scroll behavior is proven by the dev probe (Line 1 -> Line 120 on End) and by PreviewScrollKeyTests in MeditKitTests. Make the capture frontmost-gated in the follow-up. Requires the Debug build; fixtures are staged to /tmp by stage-fixtures.sh because the sandbox blocks opening repo-path files.
